artPrompt: A leering red devil-performer perched on the seat of a carnival dunk tank, claws gripping the rail, tail flicking, grinning down through the murky water as the trip-lever glints below him. Strings of lurid lights and ember sparks frame the tall tank against smoky black tents. One hot-gold firelight source rakes his sneering face from the dark, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Dunk Tank Devil
text: When Dunk Tank Devil enters the battlefield, any player may roll a six-sided die. On a 1, Dunk Tank Devil deals 3 damage to that player as the lever springs unexpectedly.
flavorText: "Go on, take a throw. He's been talking trash about your mother all afternoon."
